allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -EA SilentlyContinue }')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process node -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '\\''*'\\'' } | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '16932,49860,51616 | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -EA Stop; "killed $_" } catch { "skip $_" } }')
Bash(python -c "import PIL, PIL.Image as I; im=I.open\('File riferimento/Zato_Logo_R_2022_pos.png'\); print\(PIL.__version__, im.size, im.mode\)")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('public/zato-logo.png'\); print\('public/zato-logo.png', im.size, 'aspect', round\(im.size[0]/im.size[1],2\)\)")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process node -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -EA Stop } catch {} }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -EA SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process node -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -EA Stop } catch {} }')
